sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9503" key="a)ntapofe/rw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνταπο-φέρω</orth>, <sense id="n9503.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">catch in turn,</tr_> of a ball, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:107" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.107</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
